meta.title: The F-35 can fire missiles at targets BEHIND it
meta.description:
The F-35 Joint Strike Fighter's advanced avionics work in concert with the AIM-9X Sidewinder missile to make it VERY dangerous to approach from behind.
#f35 #shorts #sidewinder #stealthfighter #stealth #missile
